title: 夢を目指せ、一本道☆キミは私の……？

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff! Finished today's training! Whoa, time flies! I've got to hurry!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's everything... Okay, see you later! I'm off to the committee
meeting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is in full swing, but that's not all Copano Rickey has on
her plate at the moment. It all started a few days earlier...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So it turns out the person in charge of the local summer festival is a
fan of mine, and she'd like me to advise the committee on feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
To be more specific, they'd like me to attend their meetings a few
times a week and give my advice on the feng shui of the setup!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
They said they want me to help make the event luckier! I could really
feel their passion, and I'm really happy they came to me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, if it's okay with you, I'd like to accept their request. What do you
think? It's a yes, right? Right?! C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure about this, but... if it's only a few times a week, she
should still have time for rest days.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But more than anything, seeing her so excited and happy makes me
want to encourage her,

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how her jam-packed summer as both racing trainee and
feng shui advisor began.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few times a week, she has to rush off to her meetings straight after
training. She's busy, but things are going well for now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Good morning, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, you know! I was up all night getting a document ready for
the next committee meeting. And before I knew it, the sun was up and
Tarumae was telling me off.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Lack of sleep invites misfortune, so I'm usually careful about it... but I
must've gotten carried away!
choice_data_list: Take the day off to rest, okay?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah... actually, I was thinking of holding a special meeting today...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know how I'm always eager to raise my hand and suggest
ideas? I kind of ended up going from feng shui advisor to vice-chair
of the committee.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I got involved in lots of places, and before I knew it, I had lots of
stuff to prepare!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't worry! I'll still do all my training! And I'm an
Umamusume—I can tough it out!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And you know what, I am busy, but I'm enjoying it! Just thinking about
everyone smiling at the upcoming festival gets me filled with energy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And guess what! They've made a new design for the happi coats!
They used my feng shui advice to design them, and they turned out
lovely!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The portable shrine will be covered in auspicious colors, there'll be
lucky decorations on display, and we've prepared an elaborate stage,
so it'll be different from your usual summer festival!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes sparkle as she talks about the festival. She shows me the
thick ream of documents she's prepared, making it clear she's really
passionate about this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I can't stop her, then all I can do is support her. To help us get
through this summer, I make up my mind to study up on feng shui
myself.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What's this, breakfast? For me? Wow, you made a lucky meal! Clam
miso soup, boiled spinach, and look at that shiny rice!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Miso soup improves your luck, clams feed your intuition, and the
green in the spinach is the color of health! The white rice improves
luck with money too! Trainer, you knew all that?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant! Finished my running! Trainer, what's up next?
choice_data_list: Let's take a quick break here.
Let's take a quick break here.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh, again? Is it just me, or are we taking more breaks than usual?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Really? Well, okay!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Phew, another meeting done! But there's still more to do. Once I get
back, I've got to wash the display items on each tent one more time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Trainer?! What's with the car? Are you here... to pick me up?
choice_data_list: No, just happened to be driving by.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...You sure about that?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...Right, of course! Well, what good timing! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The days of me supporting her from the shadows continue right up
until the day of the festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wheee... Boom!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes, this is fantastic! It's so lively, everyone's smiling... I'd call this a
huge success!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I placed lots of lucky items around so we're covered on both the
landform and compass sides! Hehe, this makes all the hard work worth
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The festival venue is decorated with soul-soothing lanterns, colorful
tents, and vibrant happi coats. Just looking around and taking in the
sights is a blast in itself.
choice_data_list: Your hard work really paid off.
Your hard work really paid off.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Thanks! But, um... I could say the same to you.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Still playing dumb? You were looking out for me so I wouldn't
overwork myself, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You made me food, adjusted my training, and picked me up in your
car. I noticed, you know. Thanks for making time for me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But that's not all! What made me happiest was knowing you were
always watching over me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I was able to work as hard as I did because I knew you had my back...
So thank you!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I knew that if I got close to my mental or physical limits, you'd stop
me. And even if I fell from exhaustion, you'd catch me! I had full faith
in you!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You may not have noticed this yet, and I only realized it recently
myself... but you're my lucky charm!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm lucky when you're with me! And from here on out, I'm sure my life
will only get more and more wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So... Well... I want you to keep on supporting me. Stay by my side,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...Promise? Hehe!
